name: Warm Brie with Baked Apples
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel, quarter, and slice the apples. Sprinkle with lemon juice to prevent discoloring; set aside.
2. Melt butter over medium heat in a large saucepan. Add onions and sauté until lightly brown and caramelized. Remove from pan to a plate; set aside.
3. Add honey and sugar to the pan and stir until it has liquefied. Add apples and continue stirring until apples are almost cooked. Add grapes and raisins. Continue cooking until sugar has caramelized.
4. Pour the apple mixture into a 2-quart ceramic souffle dish or other ovenproof dish. Sprinkle with the toasted almonds.
5. Cut brie into 1-inch chunks and spread evenly over the apple mixture. Bake uncovered at 400 degrees for 12-15 minutes, or until cheese has melted and turned lightly golden.
6. Serve warm with slices of toasted French bread or crackers.
